title: squid bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[7:5.5-21]
- Resolves: RHEL-50261 - Squid memory usage increases until OOM.

[7:5.5-20]
- Resolves: RHEL-77282 - TCP connection to XX.XX.XX.XX/XXXX failed message is
  output frequently on RHEL9
full_text:

[7:5.5-20]

  output frequently on RHEL9
